transcript:
Speaker A (Human): I want to learn English. Enakku naalaikku oru interview irukku. [I want to learn English. I have an interview tomorrow.]
Speaker B (AI): Ungalukku English speaking kathukkanuma? [Do you want to learn English speaking?]
Speaker A: Aama, aana ungalala Thamizhla pesa mudiyuma? [Yes, but can you speak in Tamil?]
Speaker B: Nichayama, ungalukku English kathukkanuma? [Definitely, do you want to learn English?]
Speaker A: Aama enakku English kathukkanumnu aasai irukku, aana enkitta adhiga neramum illai, panamum illai. Apram naan Tamil medium-la vera padichirukkena. [Yes, I want to learn English, but I don't have much time or money. And I studied in Tamil medium.]
Speaker B: MySivi try pannunga. Dhinamum verum 15-20 nimisham enkooda English practice pannunga. Ore maasathula neenga super-a English pesuvinga. [Try MySivi. Practice English with me for just 15-20 minutes daily. In just one month, you will speak English super-ly.]
Speaker A: Idhula teacher yaar iruppa? [Who will be the teacher in this?]
Speaker B: Enna madhiri AI teachers. Step-by-step-a English pesa kathukuppanga. Thappu panna, udane correct pannuvanga. Mukkiyama ungalai paathu yaarum sirikka maatanga. [AI teachers like me. They will teach you to speak English step-by-step. If you make a mistake, they will correct you immediately. Most importantly, no one will laugh at you.]
Speaker A: Hmm, kekka nalla irukke. [Hmm, sounds good.]
Speaker B: Innikke MySivi app download pannunga. 50 latchathukkum adhigamanavanga dhinamum inga English practice panranga. Verum 3 rubai trial-la aarambichu, unga English-a next level-ku kondu ponga. [Download MySivi app today. More than 50 lakh people practice English here daily. Start with just a 3 rupee trial and take your English to the next level.]
Speaker A: Ippove MySivi app-a download pannunga. [Download MySivi app right now.]

summary: A Tamil-speaking presenter shares his struggles with learning English due to limited time, budget, and a Tamil-medium background. An AI avatar introduces the MySivi app, highlighting its step-by-step AI-guided lessons, instant corrections, and judgment-free environment. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app and start a 3-rupee trial.
